notes: v0.20.3 — WINDOWS HOTFIX. v0.20.2 Windows zip shipped without steam_api64.dll alongside Pulsewave.exe, so first launch errored with 'The code execution cannot proceed because steam_api64.dll was not found.' v0.20.3 re-bundles the Steam runtime DLLs (steam_api64.dll + steam_appid.txt) inside the zip. No gameplay changes vs v0.20.2 — the HOME hero banner, CHEVRON PULSE logo, and translucent hub panels from v0.20.2 are all still in.
